stemHtml: Consider a variable pitch propeller operating in a low RPM / high pitch condition. When feather is selected, the…

options.a: condition lever (pitch control) is moved to the feather position and the blades move from high pitch directly to the feather position.
options.b: condition lever (pitch control) is moved to the feather position and the blades move from high pitch through low pitch to the feather position.
options.c: power lever is moved to the feather position and the blades move from high pitch directly to the feather position.
options.d: power lever is moved to the feather position and the blades move from low pitch through high pitch to the feather position.
